projects.name: Analysis on Personality and In-Game Factors in League of Legends
projects.summary:
In-depth analysis of the human personality (MBTI) and in-game factors of League of Legends players by surveying collaboration with the Professional Spectator Youtube channel.
Korean: 리그 오브 레전드의 주 플레이 챔피언과 관련된 인게임 요소들과 플레이어의 성격(MBTI)간의 연관성을 조사하였으며, 이를 위해 프로관전러 유튜버 팀과 협업하여 설문조사를 기획하였습니다.

esports.summary:
As an entusiastic e-sports player, I am also interested in human factors in e-sports.
Few records:
items: Top 0.1% Player (Master tier) in KR Server, League of Legends (2020)
Champion in Daejeon Metropolitan City, International e-Sports Festival (IEF), League of Legends (2019)
Top-500 Player in KR Server, Overwatch (2017)
